# link11waap_proxy_templates (Data Source)

Lists all proxy templates in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Proxy Templates Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

data "link11waap_proxy_templates" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "name_of_first_proxy_tpl" {
  value = data.link11waap_proxy_templates.all.proxy_templates[0].name
}

output "proxy_template_count" {
  value = length(data.link11waap_proxy_templates.all.proxy_templates)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Read-Only

- `proxy_templates` (Attributes List) List of proxy templates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--proxy_templates))

Read-Only:

- `acao_header` (Boolean)
- `advanced_configuration` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--proxy_templates--advanced_configuration))
- `client_body_buffer_size` (String)
- `client_body_timeout` (String)
- `client_header_buffer_size` (String)
- `client_header_timeout` (String)
- `client_max_body_size` (String)
- `conf_specific` (String)
- `custom_listener` (Boolean)
- `description` (String)
- `keepalive_timeout` (String)
- `large_client_header_buffers_count` (String)
- `large_client_header_buffers_size` (String)
- `limit_req_burst` (String)
- `limit_req_rate` (String)
- `mask_headers` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `proxy_connect_timeout` (String)
- `proxy_read_timeout` (String)
- `proxy_send_timeout` (String)
- `send_timeout` (String)
- `ssl_ciphers` (String)
- `ssl_conf_specific` (String)
- `ssl_protocols` (List of String)
- `upstream_host` (String)
- `xff_header_name` (String)
- `xrealip_header_name` (String)
